rationale: Section 48.260 governs commissioner adjustments to taxable value in disaster areas. It operates independently of the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b); no textual conflict arises from increasing the exemption.
quote: the commissioner shall adjust the taxable value of property of a school district all or part of which is located in an area declared a disaster area by the governor under Chapter 418, Government Code
_note: No direct conflict. The proposed homestead exemption increase affects taxable value generally, while §48.260 addresses disaster-specific value adjustments by the commissioner.
